title: Wholesale & Distribution
description: Mixed-carton wholesale for tackle shops and distributors.

sections.heading: Built for B2B buyers
paragraphs: Access 10,000+ SKUs across terminal tackle, bait care, and storage. Consolidate multiple lines in one shipment with factory-direct pricing.
Submit an RFQ via our contact form �?our sales team responds within 1�? business days with catalog excerpts and pricing tiers.

title: Catalog Download
description: Request the latest YBB Tackle wholesale catalog.

sections.heading: 2026 wholesale catalog
paragraphs: Our full catalog is available to verified wholesale buyers. Contact us with your company details and target markets to receive a PDF catalog and price list.
Catalog includes new arrivals, best sellers, and OEM-capable product families.

title: About YBB Tackle
description: Carp and coarse terminal tackle manufacturer in China's fishing tackle hub.

sections.heading: 30+ years at the source
paragraphs: YBB Tackle operates from a dedicated production campus serving global brands with terminal tackle, bait care accessories, and tackle storage solutions.
We combine scale manufacturing with responsive OEM support �?the partner overseas buyers trust for consistent quality and delivery.

sections.heading: Scale you can verify
paragraphs: Multiple assembly lines for rigs, feeders, and hardware. In-house heat-treatment and coating for hooks and leads. Daily output capacity shared on factory visits and audits.
10,000+ active SKUs with continuous new product development each season.

title: Quality Control
description: QC processes for export-grade terminal tackle.

sections.heading: QC at every stage
paragraphs: Incoming material inspection, in-line checks, and pre-shipment AQL sampling. Test reports available for key components.
We welcome third-party inspection and buyer audits before first bulk order.

title: Sample Policy
description: Try before you scale Samples are charged at catalog sam […]

sections.heading: Try before you scale
paragraphs: Samples are charged at catalog sample price plus courier freight. Sample fees may be credited against the first bulk order above the agreed threshold.

sections.heading: OEM samples
paragraphs: Custom OEM samples may require a tooling deposit; timelines are quoted per project.

title: Terms & Conditions
description: Wholesale terms for YBB Tackle buyers.

sections.heading: B2B wholesale terms
paragraphs: All prices are ex-works unless otherwise stated. Payment terms: 30% deposit, 70% before shipment unless credit account approved.
Product specifications follow approved samples and PO confirmations. Claims must be reported within 14 days of receipt with supporting evidence.
